summary: BLOCK 150 Testing Complete - Dynamic Mood Colors Removed & Dream Catcher Fix Verified. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 150 testing complete. All features verified: (1) Now Spinning modal background stays WHITE/cream (rgb(255,247,230)) regardless of mood selection - dynamic mood colors removed. (2) Modal header stays honey-colored (#D98C2F). (3) Post button stays Honey Gradient (#FFB300->#FFA000). (4) Mood chips: inactive=#FFF8E1 bg with #3E2723 text, active=Honey Gradient with black text. (5) Crown Jewels + button opens Dream Catcher modal (data-testid='dream-catcher-modal'). (6) Most Wanted + button opens Dream Catcher modal. (7) Dream Catcher modal shows correct record info (title + artist). (8) 'Just Dreaming' button has #FFF8E1 bg with #3E2723 text. (9) 'Actively Seeking' button has Honey Gradient. (10) On success, toast shows 'ISO posted to the Hive!' and + icon changes to checkmark with Honey Gradient bg.

verified_features.feature: Now Spinning modal background stays WHITE regardless of mood
verified_features.notes: Modal background is rgb(255,247,230) - light cream, does NOT change to mood-specific colors like #1a1a2a

verified_features.feature: Now Spinning modal header stays honey-colored
verified_features.notes: Header 'Now Spinning' displays in #D98C2F honey color regardless of mood selection

verified_features.feature: Now Spinning Post button stays Honey Gradient
verified_features.notes: Button has linear-gradient(135deg, #FFB300, #FFA000) regardless of mood selection
Inactive chips have background: #FFF8E1 and color: #3E2723 (Deep Umber)
Selected chips have background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFB300, #FFA000) and color: #000 (black)

verified_features.feature: Crown Jewels + button opens Dream Catcher modal
verified_features.notes: Clicking + icon on Crown Jewel cards opens Dream Catcher intent modal with data-testid='dream-catcher-modal'

verified_features.feature: Most Wanted + button opens Dream Catcher modal
verified_features.notes: Clicking + icon on Most Wanted items opens Dream Catcher intent modal

verified_features.feature: Dream Catcher modal shows correct record info
verified_features.notes: Modal displays 'Add to your list' title with record title and artist (e.g., 'The Lakes by Taylor Swift')
Button has background: #FFF8E1 and color: #3E2723 with border: 2px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.3)
Button has Honey Gradient background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFB300, #FFA000)

verified_features.feature: Dream Catcher success flow - toast and icon change
verified_features.notes: After clicking 'Actively Seeking': toast shows 'ISO posted to the Hive!' and + icon changes to checkmark with Honey Gradient background
